'''LesTech''' was a small [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer based in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] that specialized in the production of [[Explorer droid/Legends|explorer droids]].<ref name="EGTD" /> 

The company manufactured the [[PackTrack 41LT-R]] MULE droid, the [[ER-1 amphibious probe droid]], the [[M38-series explorer droid|M38 explorer droid]] and the [[S19 astromech droid]].

LesTech approached the sport of [[Nuna-ball/Legends|nuna-ball]] with the possible interest of involving their droids in the sport.<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|sports/1344_1.html|Nuna-Ball League Looks to Expand}}</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
